reviews.title: Almost lost my AirPods because of this case.
reviews.text:
Had my AirPods attached to my phone case until it wasn’t.
On the first day I tried this case out on my phone, I almost lost my AirPods. I was Christmas shopping and had my phone in my back pocket the entire time. When I got home I noticed my AirPods wasn’t attached to my phone. So, I hopelessly went back to the first store I was at and there they were, on the parking lot floor! Thankfully no one had seen them! So no thanks to this case I have my AirPods.

reviews.title: Best for DVDs and Inserts - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
reviews.text: I've tried a few of these DVD albums, and this is best of the rest. The insert section is roomy enough so you only have to fold along one line and it will slide in comfortably  thus you can see the front and title edge. With Bellagio, you have to double fold, and it creases your insert more than you might want, especially if you think someday you might resell them -- messes with the aesthetics. As far as room, I can slip in 2 inserts, moving one up and under the blank space above and keeping the other low, so able to utilize every slot without feeling like I'm cheating myself by not having both inserts. In addition, for those annoying 3 disc DVDs/BluRay sets, you can slide one of the discs in with the insert, and it will be safe there. It's a sturdy product. I've been using my 240 count for 3 years now, and just bought a 120 in June. The 240 has held up very nicely, and I expect the same of the 120. If you have a large collection you want to transfer, you might want to do some planning ahead of time on how you want group your DVDs, because once you have packed your album, it is difficult to move pages around to reorganize. I had to remove my DVD and inserts. As long as it's not packed, you can manage. The metal clip is very strong and it's a firm hold, but when the slots are full, the bulk of it slides all the pages out because the pages are slick. I didn't have help to hold them in place, and you're going to need it. Leave a few empty in your groupings for new DVDs. The pages themselves are a good quality plastic and soft backing to avoid scratching. It's nicely balanced. I would recommend the 120 more than the 240 because it's easier to carry and store when full but as I said, my 240 has held up very nicely in 3 years. It is currently about 16# full. I don't carry the 240 by the handle. Don't want to push my luck. I can find no damage or weakening in it and every single original page is double packed with CDs  & Inserts, plus, I swiped a few pages from the 120 to put into the 240.  The downside is, if the pages ever do start to rip or tear, you can't find refills -- I've looked.  I have no hesitation in recommending this to anyone wanting to get away from cases and consolidate your DVD collection.  I just haven't found anything else I'm happy with.

COMFORTABLE FIT: The earbuds fit perfectly in your ears and provide a comfortable listening experience you can use all day. 3 soft silicone gel tips provide a super comfortable, noise-reducing fit and 2 Cush Fins guarantee a perfect fit.

TAKE CONTROL: The JBuds Pro are built with and in-line remote and microphone, so you can control the volume, skip tracks, activate Siri, Google Assistant and answering or hanging up calls all without taking out your phone.

TWO YEAR WARRANTY/30 DAY GUARANTEE -We are so sure you’ll be happy with your purchase that we offer a “30-Day Money-Back Guarantee” to ensure customer satisfaction of our Jlab products. Also included with our products is a 2-year limited warranty to ensure you are covered for up to two years in case any issues with our products arise.

reviews.title: Not was I was expecting
reviews.text: The reviews raved about this, but I got a different pair. There was no clip, the packaging boasted 10 hours of bluetooth. The mic didn't work for phone calls (too fuzzy). I returned these. I think their getting rid of a later edition of these headphones that aren't as good as the ones they've previously sold. You can see other reviews saying the same thing. There's no noise cancelation either. So yeah, I think they're just lying about the ones they send you.

reviews.title: These are great!
reviews.text: Great sound, and they actually fit my ears without falling out. They stay in my ears and don’t hurt even when I sleep with them on. Will buy again when these wear out!

reviews.title: ... used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a
reviews.text: The first time I used it I got complaints of how I sounded like I was in a tunnel

reviews.title: These Don't last.
reviews.text:
I was pretty sad to discover that these literally lasted one road trip from Oregon to Southern California. Roughly 20hrs of drive time so I used them for music and audio books. The sound quality was okay but not great. If we had a lot of road noise I couldn't hear anything on full volume
When I tried to use them for the return trip they were even quieter and the microphone wouldn't do more then a whisper on the other end. We tried multiple phones and multiple carriers to see if that was the issue
Another issue on the 2nd round was the amount of feedback we had on the line when calling or even listening to music. I thought my phone was broken or something till I turned my Bluetooth off and just used my phone speaker. I was really excited for this but won't buy them again.

reviews.title: I do not recommend these earbuds.  They have a serious design flaw.
reviews.text:
I would have easily given these earbuds 4 or 5 stars, if it wasn't for the "low battery" warning. JLAB clearly put no thought into this. Here are my issues:

1) The first low battery warning occurs about 5 minutes before the battery dies . So if you just started your jog, or just got on the bus, you're screwed. With 6 hours of play time, the low battery notification should give you at least 20 minutes notice. Since you are almost always "out and about" when listening to headphones, it would be nice to have enough juice to finish your activity or get where you are going.

2) The low battery message (which is verbal) repeats FREQUENTLY for the brief remainder of your battery life, constantly interrupting your music. This is so annoying you wind up taking the earbuds off.

Since the earbuds are essentially useless once you get the first low battery warning, the warning serves no purpose. Giving the low battery warnings at the 30, 20 and 10 minute marks would be far less annoying and actually give you a chance to get to a charger.

reviews.title: Great for outside work
reviews.text:
Was wearing these when taking down Christmas decorations and listening to an audio book.

My neighbor thought it was ignoring him but I just didn’t hear him - these have good noise cancellation. Sound quality was great too.

reviews.title: Solid Value
reviews.text: Regular ear buds don't fit in my ears so I need the "wings." I am very happy with how they perform but they are not as "full range" as more expensive brands.

reviews.title: Good customer service
reviews.text: I had some issues with my first set and the customer service was awesome. I appreciate a company that will backup their products.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: These are comfortable and easy to use. Good sound as well.

reviews.title: Good sound quality
reviews.text:
These are good quality but my left ear is uncomfortable. My ear must be a different shape. I was hoping the battery life would be better, but its ok. I use it to listen to books while i work. Take calls when needed.
Most bluetooth headsets have a delay or echo. These do not. It makes phone calls very clear.
These are the best sound quality of all but my Dewalt headsets.
The battery lasts about 5 to 6 hours with my streaming usage. Probably last much longer with just calls.
My left ear hurts after a couple hours, but ny right ear is fine for all day.
They charge quickly about an hour maybe a little more.
DON'T MISPLACE THE CHARGING CASE they will become worthless. They can't be charged without it.
And it seems if they power off by themselves they have to be reset in the case.
All that being said i probably would buy them again.

reviews.title: Neckbands are fine, but earhooks are useless for me
reviews.text:
The neckbands worked fine, and all items gripped my gen 2 AirPods okay, but the earhooks were not even a little useful for me.

I’m used to wearing headphones with integral earhooks, and loved the fit of those, but these add-on earhooks for Airpods do not have the right amount of rigidity, nor is it easy enough to rotate and position them appropriately with respect to the AirPod stem so that the combined geometry of the two would ever align to my ear. Because of those two factors, they simultaneously made my AirPods look kind of stupid while at the same time actually making the fit/hold even worse; they seemed almost more likely to fall out with the hooks than without them.

reviews.title: saved my husband’s life!
reviews.text: ...because it covered the sound of his snoring and I no longer am tempted to smother him with a pillow! They are very comfortable even though I’m very sensitive to irritable feelings. I’m a light sleeper and it blocked out all the little lights that keep me awake. It stayed charged all night. I’m ordering another for day time use! I’ll probably give  them to every one I know for Christmas. Seriously amazing!

reviews.title: Adequate sound quality but difficult controls.
reviews.text: I use the sleep headphones because I listen to books to get to sleep. I need the volume quite high because I use hearing aids. This headset is adequate for my purpose. It’s very comfortable to wear, but the controls are not very sensitive.

reviews.title: Works well for sleeping
reviews.text:
I wanted some headphones that were flat and wouldn't hurt my ears or fall out and get lost while I was trying to go to sleep. These work just fine. The speakers lie flatly against my head and don't poke or feel lumpy. I only use them for sleeping, though, not for exercising, so I can't say how easy or difficult it would be to remove the speakers and controller to wash the headband part.

Sound is fine. They don't go into your ear like regular earbuds, so you have to turn the volume up a little, but it does what it should. I haven't tried to control the volume using the buttons on the headband so I can't really rate that aspect. All in all, it does what I wanted it to.

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: This thing works well, but it’s not comfortable for laying down. I was hoping to wear it at night while falling asleep but there is no way to get comfortable with it on due to the small speakers inside. I’m not sure how it would work with exercise either because it’s pretty loose and I’d be worried to get sweat on it.

reviews.title: Headband, controls, sound quality, charge stats--all exactly what I wanted
reviews.text:
This resolved so many issues with other options. The headband is so very comfortable--wish I could buy 5 headbands without speakers just for the comfort for everyday wear. What I really wanted was comfortable speakers for podcasts as I go to sleep or do tasks or just enjoy! These fit the bill. Volume is perfect. Bluetooth connection is quick and stable. I can do 2 nights before charging again. The buttons work well with podcasts, moving to next or previous episodes. I just ordered a second one.

Thank you and if there is a way to get just the headband, please let me know.

reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

reviews.title: Silicone is is good. But key ring won't last
reviews.text: The silicone part was easy to put on. The adhesion holds well. But my bud case did open and a bud fell out. The problem is the key ring. The decorative pieces fell off within a month. Then the lobster claw hook fell off a few weeks later. Luckily, it happened while I was at home and not out where I would have lost my ear buds.

reviews.title: Cheap doesn't fit properly. Not a good design
reviews.text: Cheap doesn't fit properly. Not a good fit. Looks very cheap.

reviews.title: Does the job, looks cute
reviews.text: It definitely looks like the picture. The rubber is flimsy, and difficult to attach to the headphone case. It took me two tries to get it to fit the bottom appropriately, because the first time it slipped and I couldn't fit the charging cord through the back. But others might be better at this. The keychain is pretty. The clip to attach it is smaller than I anticipated and almost didn't fit my purse. It will protect the case from scratches, but that's hardly why I bought it- it's sparkly and pretty and does the job well enough.

reviews.title: Do not buy.
reviews.text: It broke one day later.

title: BESTGOT Audio Cable with Microphone Volume Control Aux Cord 3.5mm (4.3ft / 1.3m) for PS4 Controller, Headphones, Tablet PC, Computer, Laptop,Car,Mobile Phone and More (1 Pack White)
features: Note: The microphone can only support smart phones or tablets, it can't support games, laptops or desktops. A combination of incredible sound, durability and universal compatibility make this one of the real choice for those serious about audio.Built with the same grade materials as premium headphones brands. 24K gold-plated contacts ensure the cleanest sound experience possible.

Play audio from any digital devices (phones, headphones, tablets, laptops, in-car stereos, mp3 players, portable speakers and more) other media-playing device with standard 3.5mm aux port. Hi-Fi or car stereo (fits standard 3.5mm aux ports). Plug in and play your sound.

The male-to-male stereo audio cable transmits audio in stereo format. Audio cable featuring a built-in remote mic for use with your smartphone, music player or tablet device.For Calls: Short press to answer/hang up. For Music: Press pause/play.

4.3 Feet/1.3M Double-Braided Nylon Aux Cord- Super Durable and Flexible Double-braided nylon exterior prevents tangling and adds another layer of durability, life is 5 times greater than original audio cables.
Connector of BestGot audio cable has been slightly extended to fit more devices model and phone cases. Its intelligent step-down design provides a secure fit with phones while case on.

reviews.title: Nice cord for the money.
reviews.text: My son tends to break his six cords frequently. This one is holding up so far. Has a good sound in both headphones and mic.

reviews.title: One side went out after a few months
reviews.text: One side went out after a few months. Wigging the ends will sometimes restore both sides.
